zipimport/zipimporter/load_module.name: load_module
zipimport/zipimporter/load_module.description: Load the module specified by fullname. fullname must be the fully qualified (dotted) module name. Returns the imported module on success, raises ZipImportError on failure. Deprecated since version 3.10, will be removed in version 3.15: Use exec_module() instead.
